title: Orbital AI Framework
description: Local-first agentic AI framework achieving 50% fewer LLM calls through optimized 7-node LangGraph architecture. Features real-time SSE streaming, 16 Google API integrations, and resource-conscious GPU memory management for production deployment with sub-100ms latency.

title: ERP Data Analyst Agent
description: Production AI system processing 100K+ financial records daily with 95%+ accuracy. Deployed in live ERP environments, reducing analysis time from hours to minutes through intelligent query understanding, automated reporting, and 60% API cost reduction via caching.

title: DigiPin.dev & DigiPin.org - India's Postal Service API Platform
description: Official API platform for India's DigiPin postal algorithm. Production service providing digital PIN generation and validation for national postal infrastructure with sub-50ms response times, 99.9% uptime, and multi-region deployment handling thousands of daily requests.

title: Smart Meter Dashboard - KSEB Smart Meter Emulation & Sustainability Platform
description: Real-time smart electricity meter monitoring and emulation for Kerala State Electricity Board. AI-powered consumption analytics, predictive maintenance, and sustainability insights with InfluxDB time-series storage. Winner of iHack 2025 demonstrating 30% potential energy savings.

title: Cek Lumiere - National Level Techno-Cultural Fest Website
description: Official website for Cek Lumiere national-level festival. Managed 5000+ participant registrations with real-time event updates, live leaderboards, and interactive campus experience. Built with Next.js achieving 99.9% uptime during peak traffic with mobile-first responsive design.

title: UrbanAI - Climate Digital Twin
description: Real-time climate impact analysis for smart cities using NASA Earth Engine satellite data. AI-powered municipal intervention recommendations and urban planning insights with predictive climate modeling and interactive GeoJSON visualization for data-driven urban resilience planning.

title: AI-Powered Flood & Disaster Management Platform
description: Offline-first hybrid mobile and control room platform for flood and disaster mitigation. Features centralized AI insights, offline BLE/Wi-Fi mesh communication, LoRa gateway integration, real-time SOS alerts, family tracking, and QR-based safe house management for network-disrupted emergencies.

title: Webly.io - AI Web Development Platform
description: AI-powered web development platform generating production-ready code from natural language descriptions. Features real-time collaboration, component library, and one-click deployment with token-based pricing. Converts descriptions into deployable Next.js applications with live preview.

title: Career Guidance System
description: AI-powered career counseling platform helping students explore educational paths through aptitude testing and personalized recommendations. Features ML-based career path matching, comprehensive college discovery engine, and progress tracking with integrated education database.

title: AI Content Processor
description: Multi-source content processing platform using LangChain and LangGraph. Processes YouTube videos, documents, and workflows with intelligent extraction, AI summarization, and interactive Q&A. Features workflow automation with vector database integration and conversational interface.
